description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
All of my links: https://linktr.ee/garage_flips

Lonnie and Candice pack the day's eBay orders — Part 2 of a busy Friday packing session, picking up after the four-box encyclopedia run from Part 1. This installment includes the day's hero pack — a vintage Bombay Company mahogany "death desk briefcase" letter box that needed a custom-cut 16-cube box and a generous round of bogus paper to ship safely — plus Candice's $5 yard-sale find from the Aida Springs sale that just shipped out for $80. Plenty of smaller packs in between: Blink security cameras (a $20 → $90 quick flip from Thursday), a multi-item US Army apparel order, a 35mm film theatrical trailer lot, a heavy box of vintage reels, a Pucky Butterfly Baby plush pendant, an Isabella Fiore vintage purse, a vintage Coca-Cola miniatures lot, and a tangent story about Friday's $10 / two-trash-bags fill-a-bag warehouse haul that's coming up on Shed Flips soon.

If you watch reseller and packing-channel content for the day-in-the-life rhythm — orders coming in, packs going out, banter while we work — this is exactly that. Order receipts are visible on screen for each pack so you can see what we sold for.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
0:00 Picking up where Part 1 left off
1:16 Blink security cameras ($20 → $90 quick flip)
3:42 The G.I. Joe pull we almost missed
4:43 US Army apparel multi-item order
8:55 Our FedEx driver is tougher than us
10:30 35mm film trailer lot + heavy reels box
14:55 Story time: $10 for two trash bags of craft stuff
19:45 The Vintage Bombay briefcase (today's challenge pack)
30:12 Candice's $5 → $80 yard-sale purse
33:48 We thought today was going to be brutal

Thanks for hanging out with us in the shed packing today's orders. If you like watching real reselling life as it happens, subscribe and we'll see y'all in the next one.

#ImGonnaPackIt #PackWithUs #EbayPacking #ResellerLife #ShedFlips

chapters.title: Picking up where Part 1 left off
The G.I. Joe pull we almost missed
Our FedEx driver is tougher than us
35mm film trailer lot + heavy reels box
Story time: $10 for two trash bags of craft stuff
The Vintage Bombay briefcase (today's challenge pack)
We thought today was going to be brutal

fulltitle: This Pack Was Challenging — But So WORTH IT
